_comment: A worked, fake-data example plan — matches examples/example_audit.json. This is what an AI assistant might hand back after being shown the audit files and asked to propose a cleanup. Every field is optional; include only what you need.

crosslist.title: Situated Cognition and the Culture of Learning (for your own reading — not required, ignored by the script)

_notes: In this fake example: ITEM0001 gets a new home in 'Learning Theories' without losing its spot in Cognitive Science. ITEM0002 gets cross-listed into the same new collection while staying in Methods and misc. ITEM0003 and ITEM0004 look like the same article (capitalization-only title difference) — that's flagged for you to check in Zotero's own Duplicate Items view rather than merged here. 'misc' is being deleted by name since it's a junk-drawer collection with nothing distinctive left in it once ITEM0002 has a real home.
